texto: Everything I had to give went to my children, and though I loved them and my husband utterly, the drudgery of the day-to-day made it seem as if not love but coffee, my Toyota and sheer logistics were what propelled me through life.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Marcia DeSanctis: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Everything I had to give went to my children, and though I loved them and my husband utterly, the…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, parenting, everything pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
